title: packera dubia
intro: Packera dubia, also known as eastern American mountain mint or eastern American mountain golden ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving cold and flu symptoms, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. Packera dubia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
